content:
# Session 8 (iter-008) ŌĆö review

## Metadata
- 1 prover lane (opus), FBC `AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/FlatBaseChange.lean`.
- **Sorry count (FBC file): 4 ŌåÆ 4** (no change). 1 in-scope (crux @ L1257) + 3 out-of-scope dead-mate.
- **NO `.lean` edits this iter.** Prover's only write was its task_result + a memory markdown
  (`memory/fbc-b2-crux-state.md`). File compiles clean (0 errors, 1 deprecation warning).
- SNAP: no prover this iter (per plan ŌĆö effort-breaker decompose only; iter-009 = mandatory SNAP prover).

## Target: `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural` (b2 crux, L1180, sorry @ L1257) ŌĆö PARTIAL
The (b2) ring-square naturality of the affine tilde-pullback dictionary `pst`. The prover did NOT close
it and added NO new compiling code, but produced a **sharpened, decision-relevant diagnosis** that prior
comments only asserted. Honest accounting: this is a no-sorry-progress iter; its value is route + dead-end
elimination.

### The real obligation, made precise
After the preserved partial (`Iso.ext` ŌåÆ `simp [Iso.trans_hom]` ŌåÆ `rw [ŌåÉassoc,ŌåÉassoc,Iso.eq_comp_inv]`)
the goal `(Ōśģ)` (case `w` @ L1229) is the **ring-square-compatible pseudofunctoriality (cocycle)
coherence of the conjugate dictionary `pst`**: `pst Žå M = ((conjugateIsoEquiv adjL adjR).symm
(gammaPushforwardNatIso Žå)).symm.app M` (L689-696). `(Ōśģ)` says the two builds of `pst` for the equal
composites `inclR Ōē½ ŽüB = Žü Ōē½ inclR'` (ring square `chartBaseChange_ring_square`) agree, with
`geom = chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison` / `reassoc = chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc` mediating the
pullback-reindexing / extendScalars-reassociation.

### Attempts (from `attempts_raw.jsonl`)
1. **Automation / faithfulness** ŌĆö `rfl`, `ext x <;> rfl`, `ext x; simp`, `aesop_cat`, `exact?`,
   `apply moduleSpec╬ōFunctor.map_injective`. ALL FAILED. **KEY FACT established:** `moduleSpec╬ōFunctor`
   (╬ō on ALL `(Spec R).Modules`, not just QCoh) is **NOT Faithful** ŌåÆ the ╬ō-injectivity route is dead
   (faithfulness only holds after restricting to the QCoh essential image of `tilde`). `ext;rfl` fails
   because the `pst` legs are genuine conjugate isos, not identity-on-sections. `aesop_cat` exhausts;
   `exact?` heartbeat-times-out.
2. **Diagnostic on the peels** ŌĆö `simp only [ŌåÉ Functor.map_comp]; congr` collapses the triple-transposed
   L1257 tail straight back to `(Ōśģ)`. ŌćÆ The 3 `homEquiv.injective` transpose peels are **provably
   reversible / setup-only**: they accomplish nothing by themselves; their sole purpose is to expose the
   `unit Ōē½ R.map(┬Ę)` form where the proven brick `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_inv_unit_triangle` (L707,
   axiom-clean) applies per-leg. The brick is **not yet applied** = the entire remaining content.
3. **Inverse-transpose shortcut** ŌĆö prove `(Ōśģ)` via `gŌéüŌü╗┬╣ = gŌééŌü╗┬╣` hoping the source becomes a bare
   `tilde` (1 transpose not 3). FAILED: both `gŌéü,gŌéé : pb(ŽüB)(pb(inclR)(tilde M)) Ōēģ pb(inclR')(tilde N')`;
   source is a *triple* pullback, so the inverse needs the same 3 transposes. No shortcut.

### Why the prover stopped (sound call)
It deliberately did NOT do a blind partial rewrite into the factored-conjugate form: that build is a
documented multi-hundred-LOC dedicated lane (analogy: this class "resisted 7 iters"), and an unverified
blind rewrite would likely regress the current clean, compiling, well-documented 3-peel partial without
reaching a better stuck point. Preserving the partial + handing off the exact route is higher value.

## Dead-mate apparatus (3 sorries L1504/L1685/L1707) ŌĆö BLOCKED (by design)
100% COMPILE-DEAD `base_change_mate_*`; left untouched per the file-stability protocol (excise in a
dedicated refactor iter, never alongside an FBC prover). Correct hygiene.

## Key findings / patterns
- **`moduleSpec╬ōFunctor` is NOT Faithful** ŌĆö global ╬ō on all of `(Spec R).Modules` cannot discharge
  section-level equalities by injectivity; only the QCoh-restricted version is faithful. (New do-not-retry.)
- **The 3 transpose peels on the crux are reversible setup, not progress** (`simp[ŌåÉmap_comp];congr`
  round-trips them). The genuine content is applying the per-leg brick after the peels.
- **The crux IS `pst` pseudofunctoriality** ŌĆö the recommended decomposition is to prove the *composition
  coherence of `gammaPushforwardNatIso`* (foundation sub-lemma, likely `ext;rfl`) first, then conjugate
  it via the `conjugateEquiv_*_comp` / whisker telescoping. See route in task_result + recommendations.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. No new declarations (`Needs blueprint entry: None` per task_result); no rename; no completed
  proof for sync to have missed; `\leanok` state unchanged (sync_leanok iter=008 already ran).

## Subagent skips
- **lean-auditor**: NO `.lean` file modified this iter (prover committed zero Lean edits ŌĆö only a memory
  markdown + its task_result) AND iter-007 lean-auditor verdict had 0 must-fix-this-iter findings. Both
  skip conditions met.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker**: NO `.lean` file received prover work this iter (no edits to verify).

## Blueprint doctor
Clean ŌĆö no orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no new `axiom`. (Report:
`logs/iter-008/blueprint-doctor.md`.)

## Coverage debt (unchanged)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 70 lean_aux nodes, all the SNAP `RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*` / `W_*` /
`MonoidalPresheaf` impl-detail helpers already deferred by the planner to the dedicated SNAP file-split
refactor iter (mark `private`). No NEW unmatched this iter (prover added no declarations).
